archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Tactical Field Operations
design_philosophy: A professional, rugged, and field-trustworthy mobile application for drone pilots. Flat, clean, and minimal. The interface serves as a command center and logbook: no gradients, no heavy drop-shadows. Emphasizes operational clarity over playful elements.

never_use: ALL CAPS (except strictly for tiny overlines/labels)

icons.style: Outline exclusively. Never filled. Never emoji.

motion.transitions: Smooth slide + fade transitions for screen navigation.
motion.feedback: Haptic feedback mandatory on critical checklist actions (tick/cross/submit).

splash_screen.layout: Centered logo (drone silhouette with 4 propellers + green checkmark) on deep navy blue background. Tagline at bottom: 'Preflight · Inflight · Postflight' in white/text_secondary.

auth_onboarding.layout: 3 slides. Top illustration/icon, H1 text, descriptive body. Bottom pagination dots + Primary CTA.

home.top_bar: Logo left. Avatar right. Green/grey connectivity dot absolutely positioned near avatar. Notification bell.
home.scanner_card: Large card with teal background or teal border. prominent QR code icon. CTA: 'Scan Drone QR'.
home.maintenance_banner: Conditional visibility. Amber background, dark text, warning icon. 'Maintenance Required for [Drone]'.
home.checklist_cards: Horizontal scroll list. Drone photo left (80x80px rounded), Content right: Name, Type (GENERIC ONLY: Multirotor, Fixed Wing, Heavy Lift, VTOL), Serial, Phase, Flight Count.
home.bottom_nav: 4 items: Home, History, Fleet Map, Profile. Plus floating action button (+) centered.

add_checklist_flow.step_1: 2x2 grid of buttons: Built-in, PDF, Photo, Voice.
add_checklist_flow.step_2: Form details: Name, type dropdown, phase selector, photo upload.
add_checklist_flow.step_3: Review list. Swipe left to delete, drag right handle to reorder, inline editable rows. Section headings bold.
add_checklist_flow.step_4: QR generated full screen, bright background for scannability.

scanner_view.layout: Full screen camera viewfinder. White rectangular frame overlay. Text below: 'Align QR Code within frame'.

operator_form.layout: Scrolling form. Inputs for Pilot, GCS, Flight ID. Read-only prepopulated Aircraft/Serial. Interactive map pin widget for location. Auto/manual toggle for Weather. Airspace check status. Mission description.

checklist_execution.header: Sticky progress bar (teal). Live summary pills: [Passed: X] [Failed: Y] [Pending: Z].
checklist_execution.list_items: Card per item. Left: Item text. Right: Side-by-side icon buttons (Green tick outline / Red cross outline). Notes icon button. 3-state logic.
checklist_execution.footer: Primary button 'Complete' (if all pass) or 'Save with Issues ⚠' (if warnings).

post_checklist_summary.layout: Failed items panel (Red/Amber border). Damage report section (Yes/No toggles + severity slider). Camera widget for media gallery. Notes multiline input. Two signature canvas widgets (Pilot, Inspector). Primary 'Save Flight Record' CTA.

history.layout: Two levels. Level 1: List of checklist groups (by Drone or Date). Level 2: Log drill-down. PDF generate icon in top right of detail view.

profile.layout: Avatar + User Info. List menu: Plan, My Checklists, Settings (Units, Language, Biometric toggle), Logout (red text).

drone_multirotor.description: Quadcopter drone flying in clear sky - use for multirotor default imagery.

drone_pilot_outdoor.description: Drone pilot with controller - use for empty states or profile headers.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' (or 'testID' in React Native) attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind. Implement the explicit color tokens and 0.5px borders for the rugged, technical feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons. Never use filled variants. Stick to Feather or Ionicons outlines.
instructions_to_main_agent.logo_implementation: Since AI image generation failed due to quota, build the logo dynamically using Expo vector icons (e.g., a drone icon stacked with a checkmark) or standard RN View shapes to meet the minimal geometric requirement.
instructions_to_main_agent.haptics: Import *expo-haptics* and apply Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light) on all checklist button presses.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Use React Navigation. Ensure safe area views are respected.
